title: Remarkably Beautiful
description: 1.19.2-1.21.11 | A visual and performance mod pack to make Minecraft look stunning with a remarkably beautiful collection of mods, resource packs, and shaders for optimized visuals and gameplay!
body:
## Introducing Remarkably Beautiful!
A vanilla+ modpack based off of Remarkably Optimized for its amazing performance, while adding amazing visuals with custom shader presets, particle effects, resource packs, and much more!

## Works Anywhere
Remarkably Beautiful only effects the visual appearance of the game, allowing for compatibility with any world or server.

## Distant Horizons
The pack includes optional Distant Horizons support which allows for incredibly high view distances with decent performance.
![Distant Horizons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/frME6zlB/images/53a7ba5107ed0d728b56ea45f582c2a81e7acf10.jpeg)

## Shader Presets
Additionally, there are three shader presets with custom settings to suit different visuals styles and performance presets. Comparison screenshots for each shader are included below.
<details>
<summary>Euphoria Patches Shader Preset (Best graphics)</summary>

Euphoria Patches comes with the best visuals and effects, but it is also the most demanding shader.
![Jungle Sunset Euphoria Patches](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/frME6zlB/images/583156c6e3b9ae321524555573524e0ec0f08cbb.jpeg)
![Cherry Sunset Euphoria Patches](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/frME6zlB/images/f7beb6328e4a8fc570579458515043d82ef9bf59.jpeg)
![Outpost Euphoria Patches](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/frME6zlB/images/728c6c52cf058f0a7d5cb6fd3d4ce74d49a38e46.jpeg)
![Forest River Euphoria Patches](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/frME6zlB/images/57ef7dd8c632104ee82cd0aafed83c3464e04bca.jpeg)
![End Portal Euphoria Patches](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/frME6zlB/images/1e98df6e2a0ac1e8a26b2770923ece5867b46245.jpeg)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Complimentary Reimagined Shader Preset (Medium graphics)</summary>

![Jungle Sunset Complimentary Reimagined](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/frME6zlB/images/3c36fcc88e88b8a1985ab6c43cfcf252d942c73e.jpeg)
![Cherry Sunset Complimentary Reimagined](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/frME6zlB/images/5120a6e8427bbbeaef699b796d1d79a521a94788.jpeg)
![Outpost Complimentary Reimagined](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/frME6zlB/images/38380d52eb408dcd559359ecd7e7bd4fb7179601.jpeg)
![Forest River Complimentary Reimagined](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/frME6zlB/images/927cfebe109c4a1c634ad48db82ed2bd04b2c1a5.jpeg)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Miniature Shader Preset (Vanilla feel + Best performance)</summary>

Miniature is the best performance shader, while keeping a vanilla feel with pixelated shadows and minimal lighting. Do note that Miniature shader does not currently support Distant Horizons.
![Jungle Sunset Miniature Shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/frME6zlB/images/4ce763c4a0b1fb11e3dec6b0dccfead2f9ac3f91.jpeg)
![Cherry Sunset Miniature Shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/frME6zlB/images/67900d91fe19dd8eeafd215e4bdbc8d34ee7da28.jpeg)
![Outpost Miniature Shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/frME6zlB/images/d61745a7fce7b233eec9938e35153aa8f1da8495.jpeg)
![Forest River Miniature Shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/frME6zlB/images/0f4642f559e97d3533fc962867fbfa86f91aaca4.jpeg)
</details>
More screenshots to showcase particle effects, animations, and more coming soon!

## Installation
I will have installation guides comming soon on the [Remarkably Optimized YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@remarkablyOptimized)! You can also refer to [Modrinth documentation](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth) on .mrpacks.

## Support or Issues?
If you encounter any issues or need assistance, join my helpful community on [Discord](https://discord.gg/hYkp5vaWZG). We're dedicated to providing prompt support and addressing any concerns you may have.

## Other Notes
If you do want to use Remarkably Beautiful as a base in your own mod pack, feel free to do so, just make sure to include credit (a link back to this page works).

Credits:
